pageContext.name: Godzilla (1973)
pageContext.description: Godzilla from the movie Godzilla vs. Megalon, released in 1973, is now available in DefoReal form!  The Godzilla, with its large eyes, strong facial features and comical movements, has been reproduced in deformed yet realistic detail! Please enjoy the 1973 version of Godzilla, that fought side by side with Jet Jaguar in a fierce battle against the Undersea Kingdom!
